title: Florida Chamber's 40th Annual Environmental Permitting Summer School Conference | Events | Greenberg Traurig LLP
content:
As part of the Florida Chamber Foundation’s ongoing effort to keep its members and other business organizations informed of the numerous environmental and growth management laws and regulations affecting Florida’s citizens and businesses, the Environmental Permitting Summer School Conference is a seminar for Florida’s environmental and growth management audience. Celebrating its 40th anniversary, this longtime program continues to serve as one of the state’s leading educational forums focused on identifying solutions to challenges facing Florida. The programs feature a unique “break-out” format and are substantially revised and updated each year to afford the most advanced and current instruction available on Florida’s environmental, energy, and growth management laws, rules, and programs, while also providing opportunities for professional development, continuing education, and networking within Florida’s environmental community.
Schedule for our GT Attorneys speaking:

Bernadette M. Rappold: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 at 10:30 am - 12:10 pm EDT, Venue: Calusa 4-5

John V. Chibbaro : Thursday, July 23, 2026 at 8:30 am to 10:10 am EDT, Venue: Calusa 11
Bernadette M. Rappold : Thursday, July 23, 2026 at 10:30 am to 12:10 pm EDT, Venue: Calusa 4-5
